creator: stacey@vickiandstacey.com
text:
Machine is new install - less than two days
Installed linux-opera-9.25.20071214 from ports
Started newly installed Gnome
Attempted to start linux-opera from Gnome menu icon
Result = nothing happens, nothing logged

Attempted to start linux-opera from cmdline: "linux-opera &"
Result = The following output appears on screen:

$ linux-opera &
[1] 1616
stroberts@ibm-t61p ~ $ shm_allow_removed is disable, set OPERA_NUM_XSHM to 0 to disable shared memory.
ELF binary type "0" not known.
ELF binary type "0" not known.
ELF binary type "0" not known.
/usr/local/share/linux-opera/bin/opera: 1: Syntax error: "(" unexpected

[1]+  Exit 2                  linux-opera
$

Fix: 

Don't know.
How-To-Repeat: 
Attempt to start linux-opera from cmdline: "linux-opera &"
